About Me

Building Intelligence,
One System at a Time.

I am an Artificial Intelligence and Data Science undergraduate at MBM University, Jodhpur — driven by an obsession with building systems that learn, adapt, and deliver measurable impact.

My work sits at the intersection of machine learning, neural architectures, and analytics. I approach every problem with engineering discipline and a builder's mindset.

Beyond code, I am a trained NCC cadet — where leadership, precision under pressure, and structured thinking have become core instincts.
